ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the student */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the student */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the student */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the student */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student's highest degree */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student submitting the application */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university to which the application is submitted */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the application is submitted */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the application decision was made */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the application decision (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* More detailed status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, decision pending, decision made) */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Amount of the application fee paid */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of application (e.g., new, reapplication) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the university (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "endowment" REAL /* Financial endowment of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the university’s website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the university record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program in years or semesters */,
  "tuition_fee" REAL /* Annual tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_cycle" TEXT /* Admission cycle (e.g., fall, spring) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., GRE, TOEFL, GMAT) */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Score obtained in the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was taken */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was taken */,
  "test_organization" TEXT /* Organization that administered the test */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the score has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements_of_purpose" (
  "sop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement of purpose */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application to which the SOP is submitted */,
  "sop_text" TEXT /* Text of the statement of purpose */,
  "sop_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the SOP (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "sop_date" TEXT /* Date the SOP was submitted */,
  "sop_length" INTEGER /* Length of the statement of purpose in words or characters */,
  "sop_topic" TEXT /* Main topic or theme of the statement of purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SOP record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SOP record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_of_purpose_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "letters_of_recommendation" (
  "lor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each letter of recommendation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application to which the LOR is submitted */,
  "lor_text" TEXT /* Text of the letter of recommendation */,
  "lor_rating" REAL /* Rating given to the LOR (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "lor_date" TEXT /* Date the LOR was submitted */,
  "recommender_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who wrote the letter */,
  "recommender_position" TEXT /* Position of the recommender */,
  "recommender_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the recommender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LOR record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the LOR record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_letters_of_recommendation_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cgpa" (
  "cgpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CGPA */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "cgpa_value" REAL /* Cumulative grade point average */,
  "cgpa_scale" INTEGER /* Scale of the CGPA (e.g., 4.0, 10.0) */,
  "cgpa_date" TEXT /* Date the CGPA was recorded */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the CGPA was obtained */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the CGPA has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CGPA record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CGPA record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cgpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cgpa_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_experience" (
  "research_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research experience */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "research_description" TEXT /* Description of the research experience */,
  "research_date" TEXT /* Date the research experience was completed */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the research was conducted */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the research supervisor */,
  "research_type" TEXT /* Type of research (e.g., academic, industrial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research experience record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research experience record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_experience_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "predicted_chance" REAL /* Predicted chance of admission (e.g., 0.92) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the predictive model used */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "model_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the predictive model used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_predictions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., technical, personal) */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., admissions committee, advisor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_feedback_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)
